metadata.name: CanvasTool 2.0 Demo
metadata.description: Example canvas showcasing new features: colors, tags, AI metadata, and more
metadata.author: CanvasTool User

nodes.text:
# Welcome to CanvasTool 2.0!

This canvas showcases the new features:
• **Colors** for each node
• **Tags** for organization
• **AI Metadata** for smart features
• **Auto-save** every 2 seconds
• **JSON Export/Import**
• **Resize handles** on all corners
• **Inline text editing**

## Colorful Nodes

Each node can have a custom background color. Try changing colors via the properties panel (coming soon).

## Organization

Use **tags** to categorize nodes:
• project-ideas
• todos
• references
• important

## AI-Powered Features

AI metadata can store:
• Automatic summaries
• Semantic embeddings
• Related content suggestions
• Classification labels

Future: AI-assisted canvas organization

aiMetadata.summary: Node explaining AI-powered features and metadata storage

nodes.text:
## Interaction Features

**Try these:**
1. Double-click text to edit inline
2. Drag nodes to move them
3. Use resize handles (corners) to change size
4. Click empty canvas to deselect
5. Ctrl+Click for multi-selection
6. Drag from connection handles to create edges

Auto-save: Changes saved every 2 seconds

aiMetadata.summary: Node listing interactive features and usage instructions

nodes.text:
## Export & Import

**File menu offers:**
• Save As JSON file
• Load from JSON file
• Auto-save toggle
• Clear storage
• New canvas
• Reset to default

Your work is automatically preserved!

aiMetadata.summary: Node explaining export/import and file management features
